abstract: Agent-ready integration guide for the Xquik X (Twitter) data platform. Covers the REST API (100+ endpoints across tweet search, user lookup, user tweets/likes/media, favoriters, mutual followers, confirmation-gated private reads, media download, extractions, monitors, events, webhooks, trends, radar, compose, style analysis, drafts, draws, connected X account listing, confirmation-gated write actions, balance reads, usage estimates, and support tickets), HMAC webhook verification, MCP setup for 10 IDEs and AI agents (2 structured API tools: explore + xquik), 23 extraction tools, tweet composition workflows, explicit untrusted-content boundaries, and complete TypeScript type definitions. Code examples use first-party HTTPS endpoints and no local bridge packages.
